project_info.name: Omid (Object-MIDI)
project_info.standard: Global Unified Audio, Control, & Driver Standard
project_info.philosophy: Predictable, low-overhead, zero-copy, highly parallelized, bare-metal friendly (#![no_std] core) digital music instrument protocol.

directory_layout.file: Crate manifest configuring standard and no_std features, zero dependencies.
Library root conditionally importing standard modules and exporting core APIs and unit tests.
Core enums mapping EventTypes and ForceProfiles alongside OmidFlags bitwise helpers.
OmidPacket implementation detailing serialization, haptic feedback, and 12-bit/16-bit high-resolution ADC constructors and getters.
High-performance, lock-free Single-Producer Single-Consumer (SPSC) Ring Buffer tailored for real-time DSP pipelines.
TopologyDescriptor defining physical hardware coordinates and resolution mapping.
Unified Audio & Control Transport (UACT) frame modeling, zero-heap Demuxer, and sample-accurate ClockSynchronizer.
SPMC OmidHostDispatcher executing real-time thread affinity pinning and Voice ID dispatching (Object ID % Worker Count).
OmidDriver trait, MockHardwareDriver endpoints, platform drivers (Linux io_uring, Windows IOCP, macOS RT constraints), and IoT drivers (Bluetooth 5 and WiFi).

byte_map.field: payload (Zero-copy IEEE 754 f32, dual u16 XY coords, or raw ADC bits)

adc_mapping.description: When the RawData flag (bit 1 of flags) is set, the payload represents a raw integer value.
adc_mapping.adc12: Capped at 4095, stored in the lower 12 bits of the payload.
adc_mapping.adc16: Stored in the lower 16 bits of the payload.

haptic_mapping.payload_byte: f32 representing actuator electromagnetic resistance intensity

uact_frame.description: Interleaves synchronous multi-channel digital audio and control packets under a single physical clock domain (e.g. 122.88 MHz PLL clock).
uact_frame.formula: Frame Size = C * 4 + 8 bytes (where C is the audio channel count)

clock_synchronization.formula: Sample Offset = (Timer Delta / PLL Clock Frequency) * Sample Rate

spsc_queue.lock_free: Yes (UnsafeCell and AtomicUsize index wrapping with Acquire/Release memory ordering)
spsc_queue.allocation: Zero heap allocation (buffer array of Option<T> on stack/static memory)

topology.receiver_thread: Core 1 (Isolated) - drains raw USB bulk streams and routes packets.
topology.dispatcher_logic: Voice ID = Object ID % Worker Count. Routes packets to SpscRingBuffer queues without mutexes.
topology.worker_threads: Worker pools pinned to separate CPU cores (Core 2, 3, etc.) running adaptive spin-looping.
topology.pinning: On Linux, directly pins threads via raw pthread FFI pthread_setaffinity_np.

platform_drivers.linux: LinuxDriver simulating usbfs file handles read/written asynchronously via io_uring submit/completion queues.
platform_drivers.windows: WindowsDriver simulating WinUSB Direct DMA (KBDD) via VirtualLock memory and overlapped IOCP threads.
platform_drivers.macos: MacosDriver simulating IOUserUSBInterface utilizing Darwin Thread Time Constraint real-time policies.

iot_drivers.bluetooth5: BleDriver simulating Bluetooth 5 advertising, MTU negotiations (23 to 512 bytes), BLE 2M PHY, and L2CAP Connection-Oriented Channels (CoC).
iot_drivers.wifi: WifiDriver simulating low-overhead TCP/UDP socket connections supporting socket-level configuration options like TCP_NODELAY.

compilation_and_verification.latency_metrics: Control pipeline latency targeted at under 10 microseconds queue-to-queue transfer.
